heading: Extension of protections to dependents
label: 3959 Extension of protections to dependents
text: Upon application to a court, a dependent of a servicemember is entitled to the protections of this subchapter if the dependent’s ability to comply with a lease, contract, bailment, or other obligation is materially affected by reason of the servicemember’s military service.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 538 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
